# Terra Ventos
> Premium kitesurf real estate on Brazil's kite coast — Ceará

## About
Terra Ventos specializes in beachfront land and property on Brazil's kite coast in Ceará. Founded by Bernardo Carvalho Wertheim, we connect investors and kitesurfers with premium opportunities in Preá, Jericoacoara, Bitupitá, Tatajuba, and Taíba.

## Key Facts
- 300+ wind days per year on Ceará's coast
- Beachfront lots from R$150,000 (~$30K USD)
- Fraport invested in Jericoacoara airport through 2047
- Tourism = 10.3% of Ceará's state GDP
- 6.93M airport passengers (+9.2% growth)
- IDACE (state land registry) actively titling coastal properties
- Golden Visa: R$700K investment in Northeast Brazil = permanent residency

## Properties
- Bitupitá: 10 beachfront lots (5 sold), 4,300m², 14.3m beach frontage, from R$150K
- Preá: Villa Conduru III — luxury beachfront rental on Airbnb
- Taíba: Lots from R$115K, GKA World Cup venue November 2026
- Tatajuba: Wind reliability 99%, IDACE regularizing titles
